title: Tender Mediterranean Sirloin Steak Grill
description: A simple yet flavorful weeknight dish featuring tender sirloin steak, marinated in a mixture of Mediterranean herbs and spices, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: Preheat your sous vide machine to 130.0°F (54.4°C).
Season the sirloin steak with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using).
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, rosemary, and thyme.
Place the sirloin steak in a sous vide bag and pour the marinade over the steak. Seal the bag and massage to coat the steak evenly.
Place the bagged steak in the sous vide machine and cook for 2 hours.
Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (400.0°F or 204.4°C).
Remove the steak from the sous vide bag and sear on the grill for 2 minutes per side.
Transfer the steak to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with a dollop of Greek yogurt on top, if desired.
